targets.rawSql: SELECT rssi AS value FROM metrics WHERE repeater_id = ${repeater:sqlstring} AND $__timeFilter(time) AND rssi IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT snr AS value FROM metrics WHERE repeater_id = ${repeater:sqlstring} AND $__timeFilter(time) AND snr IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT battery AS value FROM metrics WHERE repeater_id = ${repeater:sqlstring} AND $__timeFilter(time) AND battery IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT neighbors_count AS value FROM metrics WHERE repeater_id = ${repeater:sqlstring} AND $__timeFilter(time) AND neighbors_count IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.time, $__interval), 'RSSI' AS metric, AVG(m.rssi) AS value FROM metrics m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.time) AND m.repeater_id = ${repeater:sqlstring} AND m.rssi IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.time, $__interval), 'Noise floor' AS metric, AVG(m.noise_floor) AS value FROM metrics m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.time) AND m.repeater_id = ${repeater:sqlstring} AND m.noise_floor IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.time, $__interval), 'SNR' AS metric, AVG(m.snr) AS value FROM metrics m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.time) AND m.repeater_id = ${repeater:sqlstring} AND m.snr IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.time, $__interval), 'Link quality' AS metric, AVG(m.link_quality) AS value FROM metrics m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.time) AND m.repeater_id = ${repeater:sqlstring} AND m.link_quality IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.time, $__interval), 'Battery (V)' AS metric, AVG(m.battery) AS value FROM metrics m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.time) AND m.repeater_id = ${repeater:sqlstring} AND m.battery IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.time, $__interval), 'Battery (mV)' AS metric, AVG(m.battery_milli_volts) AS value FROM metrics m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.time) AND m.repeater_id = ${repeater:sqlstring} AND m.battery_milli_volts IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.time, $__interval), 'Uptime' AS metric, MAX(m.uptime) AS value FROM metrics m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.time) AND m.repeater_id = ${repeater:sqlstring} AND m.uptime IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.time, $__interval), 'Packets sent' AS metric, MAX(m.packets_sent) AS value FROM metrics m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.time) AND m.repeater_id = ${repeater:sqlstring} AND m.packets_sent IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.time, $__interval), 'Packets recv' AS metric, MAX(m.packets_recv) AS value FROM metrics m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.time) AND m.repeater_id = ${repeater:sqlstring} AND m.packets_recv IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.time, $__interval), 'Sent direct' AS metric, MAX(m.n_sent_direct) AS value FROM metrics m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.time) AND m.repeater_id = ${repeater:sqlstring} AND m.n_sent_direct IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.time, $__interval), 'Sent flood' AS metric, MAX(m.n_sent_flood) AS value FROM metrics m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.time) AND m.repeater_id = ${repeater:sqlstring} AND m.n_sent_flood IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.time, $__interval), 'Recv direct' AS metric, MAX(m.n_recv_direct) AS value FROM metrics m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.time) AND m.repeater_id = ${repeater:sqlstring} AND m.n_recv_direct IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.time, $__interval), 'Recv flood' AS metric, MAX(m.n_recv_flood) AS value FROM metrics m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.time) AND m.repeater_id = ${repeater:sqlstring} AND m.n_recv_flood IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.time, $__interval), 'Queue length' AS metric, AVG(m.queue_len) AS value FROM metrics m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.time) AND m.repeater_id = ${repeater:sqlstring} AND m.queue_len IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.time, $__interval), 'Air time (s)' AS metric, MAX(m.total_air_time_secs) AS value FROM metrics m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.time) AND m.repeater_id = ${repeater:sqlstring} AND m.total_air_time_secs IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.time, $__interval), 'Error events' AS metric, MAX(m.err_events) AS value FROM metrics m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.time) AND m.repeater_id = ${repeater:sqlstring} AND m.err_events IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.time, $__interval), 'Direct duplicates' AS metric, MAX(m.n_direct_dups) AS value FROM metrics m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.time) AND m.repeater_id = ${repeater:sqlstring} AND m.n_direct_dups IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.time, $__interval), 'Flood duplicates' AS metric, MAX(m.n_flood_dups) AS value FROM metrics m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.time) AND m.repeater_id = ${repeater:sqlstring} AND m.n_flood_dups IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(n.time, $__interval), 'Neighbor sightings' AS metric, COUNT(*)::double precision AS value FROM neighbors n WHERE $__timeFilter(n.time) AND n.repeater_id = ${repeater:sqlstring} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT COALESCE(r.label, latest.repeater_id) AS repeater, latest.time AS last_sample, latest.rssi, latest.snr, latest.snr_raw, latest.battery, latest.battery_milli_volts, latest.noise_floor, latest.link_quality, latest.neighbors_count, latest.queue_len, latest.uptime, latest.total_air_time_secs, latest.packets_sent, latest.packets_recv, latest.n_sent_direct, latest.n_sent_flood, latest.n_recv_direct, latest.n_recv_flood, latest.err_events, latest.n_direct_dups, latest.n_flood_dups FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (repeater_id) repeater_id, time, rssi, snr, snr_raw, battery, battery_milli_volts, noise_floor, link_quality, neighbors_count, queue_len, uptime, total_air_time_secs, packets_sent, packets_recv, n_sent_direct, n_sent_flood, n_recv_direct, n_recv_flood, err_events, n_direct_dups, n_flood_dups FROM metrics WHERE repeater_id = ${repeater:sqlstring} AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY repeater_id, time DESC) latest LEFT JOIN repeaters r ON r.repeater_id = latest.repeater_id;

SELECT neighbor_id, COUNT(*) AS sightings, ROUND(AVG(snr)::numeric, 2) AS avg_snr, MAX(time) AS last_seen FROM neighbors WHERE repeater_id = ${repeater:sqlstring} AND $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY neighbor_id ORDER BY sightings DESC, last_seen DESC LIMIT 20;

list.definition: SELECT repeater_id AS __value, COALESCE(label, repeater_id) AS __text FROM repeaters ORDER BY 2;
list.label: Repeater
list.name: repeater
list.query: SELECT repeater_id AS __value, COALESCE(label, repeater_id) AS __text FROM repeaters ORDER BY 2;
